workPackages.name: App Skeleton, Create/Read, Empty State & Validation
workPackages.goal: Set up the basic HTML/CSS/JS for the app. Implement the ability to add a new text note via an input field, save it to `localStorage`, and display a list of all saved notes. Include a visible empty state when no notes exist and validation to prevent saving blank/empty notes.

workPackages.name: Update/Edit Notes Functionality
workPackages.goal: Extend the application to allow users to click an 'Edit' button on an existing note, modify its content within the UI, and save the updated content back to `localStorage`.

workPackages.name: Delete Notes Functionality
workPackages.goal: Extend the application to allow users to click a 'Delete' button on an existing note, removing it from the UI list and permanently deleting it from `localStorage`. Ensure the empty state UI reappears if the last note is deleted.

workPackages.name: Automated Smoke Tests
workPackages.goal: Add a simple automated smoke test suite that navigates to the app and verifies the end-to-end flow: creating with validation, reading, updating, deleting notes (and empty states), and asserting data persistence after a page reload.
